metadata.title: Mission & Vision | GS1 Saudi Arabia
metadata.description: Our strategic roadmap for a digitally integrated Saudi supply chain by 2030.

hero.title: Defining the Future of
hero.description: Our Mission and Vision are the blueprints for a Saudi Arabia where every product tells a story of quality, safety, and digital excellence.

vision.title: A Unified Language for
vision.description: To implement and promote GS1 global standards in Saudi Arabia, providing businesses with reliable identification, traceability, and authentication solutions that enhance market access, ensure regulatory compliance, and build consumer trust.

mission.title: Empowering the Kingdom's
mission.description: To empower Saudi organizations with global standards that enhance efficiency, safety, and regulatory compliance. We bridge the gap between local production and global standards, ensuring KSA's logistics sector remains a world leader.

points.title: Universal Standards
points.desc: Implementing GS1 systems across Retail, Healthcare, and Logistics.

points.title: Regulatory Synergy
points.desc: Supporting SFDA and ZATCA in national traceability mandates.

points.title: SME Acceleration
points.desc: Helping Saudi businesses reach global marketplaces like Amazon and Noon.

items.title: Integrity
items.desc: Ensuring the absolute accuracy of the Kingdom's product data.

items.title: Innovation
items.desc: Pioneering the shift to 2D barcodes and RFID by 2027.

items.title: Collaboration
items.desc: Working as one with government authorities and private sectors.

metadata.title: Strategic Partners | GS1 Saudi Arabia
metadata.description: Explore the ecosystem of GS1 Saudi Arabia's strategic partners, including SFDA, ZATCA, and SASO, driving global standards and Saudi Vision 2030.

hero.title: Building the Future of
hero.description: At GS1 Saudi Arabia, we partner with government authorities and industry leaders to drive Vision 2030 through standardized digital transformation and global identification.

regulatory.title: SFDA
regulatory.desc: Implementing GS1 DataMatrix for the RSD system to ensure pharmaceutical safety.

regulatory.title: ZATCA
regulatory.desc: Phase 2 Fatoora integration utilizing GLNs for seamless B2B transaction identification.

regulatory.title: SASO
regulatory.desc: Product conformity and GTIN registration requirements for the Saudi market.

list.name: FSC
list.desc: The primary representative of the Saudi business community, ensuring global standards for local commerce.

list.name: SFDA
list.desc: Mandating GS1 DataMatrix for the National Drug Track and Trace System (Rasad).

list.name: ZATCA
list.desc: Collaborating on E-Invoicing (Fatoora) standards using Global Location Numbers (GLN).

list.name: SASO
list.desc: Standardizing product conformity (SABER) via Global Trade Item Numbers (GTIN).

list.name: MOH
list.desc: Adopting GS1 standards for medical device identification and patient safety.

marketplace.title: Unlock the Kingdom's
marketplace.description: GS1 Saudi Arabia provides the authentic GTINs and identifiers required to list and sell your products on major platforms, ensuring global discoverability and consumer trust.

platforms.name: Amazon.sa
platforms.label: Sell on Amazon
platforms.description: GTINs are mandatory for listing on Amazon's global catalog.

platforms.name: Noon.com
platforms.label: Expand on Noon
platforms.description: Unique product identification ensures accurate listing on Noon.

cta.title: Ready to Partner?
cta.description: Join the global network of 116 countries and thousands of Saudi companies.

metadata.title: Strategy & Roadmap | GS1 Saudi Arabia
metadata.description: The GS1 Saudi Arabia 2027 Strategic Roadmap: Driving 2D migration and Vision 2030 supply chain excellence.

hero.title: Architecting the
hero.description: Aligning global standards with Saudi Vision 2030 to build a seamless, digital, and globally competitive national supply chain.

items.title: Digital Link Migration
items.desc: Transitioning the Saudi retail landscape from traditional 1D barcodes to GS1 Digital Link QR codes by 2027.

items.title: Regulatory Alignment
items.desc: Deepening integration with SFDA (Rasad) and ZATCA (Fatoora) to ensure 100% compliance for Saudi businesses.

items.title: Export Readiness
items.desc: Equipping Saudi manufacturers with global identifiers (GTIN/GLN) to seamlessly enter international marketplaces.

steps.task: Full SFDA Veterinary & Medical Device Serialization

metadata.title: Who We Are | GS1 Saudi Arabia
metadata.description: The official sole authorized entity for GS1 standards in the Kingdom, driving the digital language of Saudi business.

hero.title: The Global Language of
hero.description: GS1 Saudi Arabia is the national authority responsible for implementing global GS1 standards in the Kingdom. It provides businesses with unique barcodes and digital identification solutions, ensuring product traceability, authenticity, and compliance with international and local regulations. GS1 Saudi Arabia empowers companies to access local and global markets while enhancing consumer trust and protecting against counterfeiting.

about.title: Driving the Kingdom’s
about.description: GS1 Saudi Arabia (locally known as the Saudi Barcode Center) is the sole authorized entity responsible for promoting and guiding the adoption of GS1 standards across industries in the Kingdom. From retail automation to life-saving healthcare traceability, we provide the common foundation for Saudi businesses to identify, capture, and share vital data globally.

missionVision.title: Our Vision
missionVision.desc: To be the trusted authority for global standards in Saudi Arabia, enabling businesses to uniquely identify, track, and authenticate products while fostering trust, quality, and efficiency in local and international markets.

missionVision.title: Our Mission
missionVision.desc: To empower Saudi organizations with global standards that enhance efficiency, safety, and regulatory compliance.

governance.title: Leadership &
governance.desc: Our board of directors consists of industry leaders from the public and private sectors, ensuring alignment with national economic goals.

partners.title: Strategic Partnerships
partners.subtitle: Collaborating with national authorities to enforce global standards.

logos.name: SFDA
logos.link: Advancing drug safety through Rasad integration
